# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in this repository, please report it
responsibly. **Do not** create a public GitHub issue.

### How to Report

- Email: opensource-codeofconduct@amazon.com
- AWS Security: https://aws.amazon.com/security/vulnerability-reporting/

### What to Include

- Description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Potential impact assessment
- Suggested fix (if any)

### Response Timeline

- **Acknowledgment**: Within 48 hours
- **Initial Assessment**: Within 5 business days
- **Resolution**: Dependent on severity

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| 1.0     | Yes       |

## Scope

This security policy covers:
- Data files in `data/`
- Survey templates in `surveys/`
- GitHub Actions workflows in `.github/workflows/`
- Cloudflare Worker in `workers/`
- All scripts in `scripts/`
